Acetaminophen Level 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/acetaminophen-level/ 
Acetaminophen Level 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an acetaminophen level test? 
This test measures the amount of acetaminophen in your blood. Acetaminophen is a medicine used in many over-the-counter (OTC) and prescription medicines. It is used to relieve pain and reduce fever . It comes in liquid, chewable, capsule, or pill form. It is found in many brand name medicines, including Tylenol and Excedrin. Outside the
